subject: Get your students game ready this March
previewText: Whether you're new or returning, this one's built for you.
module-2-0-0:
Get your students game ready this March

Whether you're new or returning, this one's built for you.
module-4-0-0: Storybook character chat
module-5-1-0: Invite young learners to step into their favorite books by interviewing the characters who live there — a playful, standards-aligned Space perfect for early elementary ELA lessons and reading celebrations.
module-10-0-1: March Classroom Collaborative Sandbox: getting game ready!
module-10-0-2: Join us Wednesday, March 12th from 1–2 PM for this month's Classroom Collaborative Sandbox, where we'll help hosts feel confident using Mission Control, the Browser Extension, and student Spaces to get students game ready. Whether you're brand new or a returning host, you'll explore what Mission Control can tell you about your students, get hands-on with the Browser Extension for test prep, set up engaging Spaces, try the new collaborative materials, and leave with everything you need to launch with confidence. Can't make it live? We'll send the recording. RSVP today!
module-12-0-0: Elevate your students' SAT readiness with SchoolAI
module-12-0-1:
Test prep doesn't have to mean endless drills. Our new SAT Test Prep Toolkit gives students personalized AI study partners called Spaces, built to meet them at their skill level.

 

From the SAT Diagnostic Coach that identifies gaps in minutes, to the Math Tutor and Reading Passage Navigator, each Space builds real confidence and strategy. Students stop grinding through practice problems and start walking into test day feeling genuinely prepared. Your classroom becomes the place where that transformation happens.
